title: Free Minecraft Models
description: Put custom models in your Minecraft server without client mods, for free!
body:
Note: FreeMinecraftModels trailer coming soon, for now here's Yggdrasil, the biggest project we've made using FreeMinecraftModels!

# 🟠 Main Features: - **Add custom furniture, scriptable items with custom models and interactive props directly into your Minecraft world!** - **Fully usable and scriptable furniture and items: sit, sleep, store, and far beyond! With full Lua scripting support, the only limit is your imagination!** - **Converts models from Blockbench to Minecraft resource packs!** - **Bypasses usual Minecraft limitations for model sizes and rotations!** - **Made to be easy to use via API!** - **Can handle importing Blockbench models or FMM models, meaning creators can distribute uneditable models at will!** - **No dependencies!** - **Want an even better and richer playing experience?** This plugin works best with [BetterStructures](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/betterstructures/), [EliteMobs](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/elitemobs/), and [Resource Pack Manager](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/resourcepackmanager/)! — all free! # 🟠 How to Setup: 1. **Put the FreeMinecraftModels.jar into your server** and **restart your server** 2. Download the content your want from the additional downloads and put it, **without unzipping**, into the **~plugins/EternalTD/imports** folder 3. Do **/fmm reload** or **restart your server**. Restarting is recommended. 4. You're done! **How to generate a resource pack:** The resource pack output can be found in the outputs folder of the plugin's configuration file. This will contain a resource pack containing all the models in the models folder. # 🟠 Additional downloads:


Or create your own content by following the documentation!

# 🟠 View More by Magmaguy!

# 🟠 Partner servers: **Matecraft is the official partner server!** It is run by me and is always **up-to-date with the latest experimental features and new dungeons**! Check it out if you want to see my plugins the way they were originally developed to work! It's got a cozy community of dedicated and welcoming players that call it home!

eternaltd.matecraft.org
